description_long: This is a pixelated, wooden bucket or barrel with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered body. The exterior is composed of vertical wooden staves, held together by two prominent gray metallic hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The top is open, revealing a hollow interior, and a rectangular handle is attached to one side, constructed from the same gray material as the hoops. The wood texture is blocky and stylized, reminiscent of voxel art, with visible segmentation and a matte finish. The object appears sturdy and functional, suitable for carrying or storing liquids or materials in an urban or rustic setting.
description: A stylized, open wooden bucket or barrel with gray metal hoops and a rectangular side handle, featuring a blocky, voxel-art texture.
description_view_0: The open top, interior, and the rectangular side handle are clearly visible, showing the bucket's hollow structure.
description_view_1: The bucket is seen from an angle that highlights the metallic hoops and the wooden staves, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_2: A side view showing the full cylindrical body, both metal hoops, and the handle just peeking out from the left edge.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bucket, focusing on the wooden staves and metal hoops, with the handle not visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: gray metal hoops at top and bottom
